title: 2026 Bridal Trends in Nepal
excerpt: From traditional Teej looks to modern fusion styles — the top bridal hair and makeup trends this season.
body:
Nepal's Bridal Scene in 2026

Nepali brides in 2026 are blending traditional and contemporary aesthetics like never before. Here are the key trends our bridal team is seeing.

1. Soft Glam Over Heavy Makeup

The era of heavy foundation is over. Brides are requesting skin-like foundations, glossy lips and feathered brows.

2. Traditional Hair with Modern Accessories

Classic chignons and braids are back but accessorized with modern gold hairpins and fresh flowers.

3. Fusion Sarees with Western Makeup

Many brides are wearing traditional sarees or lehenga but opting for Western-inspired glam makeup.

Book your bridal package early — call 9843805588
author: Deepa Rai
